description: Earthmover bundle for College Board PSAT/SAT assessments including PSAT 8/9, PSAT 10, PSAT/NMSQT, and SAT
required_fields: Section scores (LATEST_SAT_EBRW, LATEST_SAT_MATH_SECTION or LATEST_PSAT_EBRW, LATEST_PSAT_MATH_SECTION)
notes: This bundle supports multiple PSAT/SAT assessment types. The assessment type is automatically determined based on the columns present in the input file and/or the LATEST_PSAT_GRADE value.
